items.title_en: Analysis: Chairman Kevin Warsh’s task forces are the key to understanding the new Fed

items.desc_en: The new leader of the Fed left interest rates alone but made clear how he plans to rewire the central bank.
items.desc_zh: 美联储新任领导人并未提及利率问题，但明确表示他计划如何重组央行。

items.title_en: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·冈拉克 (Jeffrey Gundlach) 表示，美联储的沃什不会成为许多人希望的“轻松赚钱”主席
items.desc_en: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.
items.desc_zh: 冈拉克表示，沃什的立场降低了过度宽松货币政策的风险，这种政策可能会重新引发通胀并推高长期借贷成本。

items.desc_zh: 他们表示，针对林赛和克雷格·福尔曼的诉讼程序存在严重违规行为。

items.title_en: Ex-Nigeria oil minister cleared in UK bribery trial
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚前石油部长在英国受贿案中洗清罪名
items.desc_en: Diezani Alison-Madueke had been accused of receiving bribes from oil tycoons but was found not guilty by a jury at Southwark Crown Court.
items.desc_zh: 迪扎尼·艾莉森·马杜克被指控收受石油大亨贿赂，但被南华克皇家法院陪审团裁定无罪。

items.title_en: Chairman Warsh abstains from giving rate forecast as several members signal a hike in 2026
items.title_zh: 由于几位成员暗示 2026 年加息，主席沃什放弃给出利率预测
items.desc_en: The median projection called for the federal funds rate to end 2026 at 3.8%, a quarter percentage point above the current target range.
items.desc_zh: 预计联邦基金利率到 2026 年底将达到 3.8%，比当前目标范围高出四分之一个百分点。

items.title_en: 2-year Treasury yield rockets higher as many Fed officials signal possible hike this year
items.title_zh: 由于许多美联储官员暗示今年可能加息，两年期国债收益率飙升
items.desc_en: U.S. Treasury yields rose on Wednesday after the Fed held interest rates steady during Kevin Warsh's first policy meeting as chairman.
items.desc_zh: 美联储在凯文·沃什(Kevin Warsh)担任主席的首次政策会议期间维持利率稳定后，美国国债收益率周三上涨。

items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，如果伊朗协议未能成功，他喜欢指责万斯

items.title_en: JetBlue to reduce Newark, LaGuardia footprint as it forges ahead in Fort Lauderdale

items.title_en: Serial killer who murdered eight women in Long Island town imprisoned for life
items.title_zh: 在长岛镇谋杀八名妇女的连环杀手被终身监禁
items.desc_en: In fiery exchange, judge sentenced him to three life sentences plus 25 years to life on four other charges, all running consecutively.
items.desc_zh: 在激烈的交锋中，法官判处他三项无期徒刑，外加其他四项罪名，判处 25 年无期徒刑，所有罪名都是连续执行的。

items.title_en: Trump says he will visit India as frosty relationship with Modi thaws
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，随着与莫迪的冰冷关系解冻，他将访问印度

items.desc_zh: 特朗普在聊天中宣布了这一消息，他还誓言要保护印度。

items.title_en: AI will create more jobs for humans, not replace them, Amaon founder Bezos says
items.title_zh: Amon创始人贝佐斯表示，人工智能将为人类创造更多就业机会，而不是取代他们
items.desc_en: The Amazon founder, who now has robotics and space travel companies, thinks AI will create a labour shortage.
items.desc_zh: 这位亚马逊创始人现在拥有机器人和太空旅行公司，他认为人工智能将造成劳动力短缺。

items.title_en: The private space race is spurring a luxury hotel land grab for Florida oceanfront property
items.title_zh: 私人太空竞赛正在刺激豪华酒店争夺佛罗里达海滨地产的土地
items.desc_en: The rise of the private space industry, with companies like SpaceX and Blue Origin, has spurred demand for commercial real estate on Florida's space coast.
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 和 Blue Origin 等公司的兴起，刺激了佛罗里达州太空海岸商业地产的需求。

items.title_en: Iran sends tankers loaded with oil past US military blockade
items.title_zh: 伊朗派遣满载石油的油轮突破美国军事封锁
items.desc_en: Three Iranian tankers loaded with crude oil have passed the US blockade line in the Gulf of Oman, ship-tracking data shows.
items.desc_zh: 船舶跟踪数据显示，三艘满载原油的伊朗油轮已通过美国在阿曼湾的封锁线。

items.title_en: Bystanders smash windows of private jet to rescue passengers after crash
items.title_zh: 私人飞机坠毁后，旁观者砸碎窗户营救乘客
items.desc_en: One of the six people on board died in the crash, a local official said. The five survivors were taken to hospital and are in a stable condition.
items.desc_zh: 当地官员称，机上六人中有一人在事故中死亡。五名幸存者被送往医院，目前情况稳定。

items.title_en: Search for six-year-old Ebola patient after armed men storm DR Congo hospital
items.title_zh: 武装人员冲进刚果民主共和国医院后寻找六岁埃博拉患者
items.desc_en: Health facilities have come under attack during the current outbreak as a result of misinformation and fear.
items.desc_zh: 在当前的疫情爆发期间，由于错误信息和恐惧，卫生设施受到攻击。

items.title_en: Snap unveils $2,195 smart glasses after previous flops
items.title_zh: Snap 继之前的失败后推出售价 2,195 美元的智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 母公司的增强现实眼镜预计将于秋季发货。

items.title_en: Norway's crown princess undergoes successful lung transplant, palace says
items.title_zh: 挪威王储妃成功接受肺移植手术
items.desc_en: Crown Princess Mette-Marit, who suffered from pulmonary fibrosis, will now spend several weeks recovering in hospital.
items.desc_zh: 患有肺纤维化的王储妃梅特玛丽特现在将在医院康复数周。

items.title_en: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
items.title_zh: 尽管特朗普批评，以色列对黎巴嫩发动新的打击
items.desc_en: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".
items.desc_zh: 特朗普周二表示，以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡需要“对黎巴嫩更加负责”。

items.title_en: Status quo at Jerusalem's holiest site under threat as Israeli nationalists flout rules
items.title_zh: 以色列民族主义者无视规则，耶路撒冷圣地的现状受到威胁
items.desc_en: Israeli nationalists are increasingly flouting a convention on how faiths share the al-Aqsa mosque compound.
items.desc_zh: 以色列民族主义者越来越多地蔑视关于信仰如何共享阿克萨清真寺大院的公约。

items.title_en: Group planned to attack White House UFC event using snipers and drones, FBI says
items.title_zh: FBI 称，该组织计划使用狙击手和无人机袭击白宫 UFC 赛事
items.desc_en: In newly unsealed court filings, the government says the group allegedly expressed grievances about corruption, the Epstein files, and data centres.
items.desc_zh: 在新公布的法庭文件中，政府表示，该组织据称对腐败、爱泼斯坦档案和数据中心表示不满。
